name: django-ims
label: Django + InvenTree Patches
description: Django app extensions deployed into InvenTree via SSH

patterns.models: managed=False with raw SQL in deploy; db_table = '{module}_{model}'; AUTH_USER = settings.AUTH_USER_MODEL for user FKs; string refs for cross-module FKs: 'part.Part'; TextChoices for enums; auto_now_add for created_at
patterns.api: Use InvenTree.mixins.ListCreateAPI and RetrieveUpdateDestroyAPI; InvenTree.filters.SEARCH_ORDER_FILTER; override get_queryset() for RBAC; override perform_create() for user assignment
patterns.urls: Export BOTH urlpatterns AND {module}_api_urls; path names: api-{module}-list, api-{module}-detail
patterns.serializers: Separate ListSerializer + DetailSerializer; read_only_fields for timestamps; SerializerMethodField for computed properties
patterns.frontend: HTML templates with fetch() to /api/{module}/; Bootstrap 5; vanilla JS

registration.settings: Add '{module}.apps.{ModuleName}Config' to INSTALLED_APPS in InvenTree/settings.py BEFORE InvenTree config
registration.urls_api: Add path('{module}/', include(('{module}.urls', '{module}'))) to apipatterns in InvenTree/urls.py

deploy.upload_pattern: SFTP to /tmp → sudo cp to destination → rm /tmp file
deploy.db_method: Raw SQL via: sudo -u postgres psql -p 4235 -d inventree -f /tmp/setup.sql
deploy.db_rules: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS; CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS; GRANT ALL ON TABLE ... TO inventree
deploy.prerender: Run manage.py prerender BEFORE collectstatic when editing templates/js/translated/*.js

never_do: Create Django users/tokens on production without permission
Use systemctl restart inventree (wrong unit name, silently no-ops)
Deploy during 9am-7pm IST business hours unless hotfix
always_do: Check existing deploy scripts for patterns before writing new ones

mobile_css.approach: Separate CSS file injected via link tag in base.html

patterns.tables: Hide table on mobile, show card layout with key fields
patterns.sidebar: Collapse to hamburger menu on mobile
patterns.forms: Full-width inputs, stacked labels on mobile
patterns.modals: Full-screen on mobile, centered dialog on desktop
patterns.navigation: Bottom fixed nav on mobile, sidebar on desktop
patterns.lists: Card-based layout on mobile with swipe-friendly spacing
